title: Barrier-Free Path of Travel
section_title: Adaptable Dwelling Units of Residential Occupancy
text: 1) In the dwelling unit, the barrier-free path of travel shall extend from the door at the entrance to the dwelling unit to the inside of at least one of each of the following spaces: a) a bathroom (see Note A-3.8.5.2.(1)(a)), b) a living room, c) a dining room, d) a kitchen, e) a bedroom, and f) a balcony, where provided. 2) Where the barrier-free path of travel giving access to the spaces referred to in Sentence (1) has a corridor, a level clear floor space shall be provided for changes of direction in the corridor of not less than a) 1 500 mm in diameter, or b) 1 500 mm by 1 050 mm.

title: Barrier-Free Path of Travel
section_title: Visitable Dwelling Units of Residential Occupancy
text: 1) In the dwelling unit, the barrier-free path of travel shall extend from the door at the entrance to the dwelling unit to the inside of at least one of each of the following: a) a washroom (see Note A-3.8.4.2.(1)(a)), b) a living room, and c) a dining room. 2) Where the barrier-free path of travel giving access to the spaces referred to in Sentence (1) has a corridor, a level clear floor space shall be provided for changes of direction in the corridor of not less than a) 1 500 mm in diameter, or b) 1 500 mm by 1 050 mm.

title: Barrier-Free Path of Travel
text: 1) In the dwelling unit, the barrier-free path of travel shall extend from the door at the entrance to the dwelling unit to the inside of at least one of each of the following: a) a washroom (see Note A-3.8.4.2.(1)(a)), b) a living room, and c) a dining room. 2) Where the barrier-free path of travel giving access to the spaces referred to in Sentence (1) has a corridor, a level clear floor space shall be provided for changes of direction in the corridor of not less than a) 1 500 mm in diameter, or b) 1 500 mm by 1 050 mm.

title: Article 14
section: CHAPTER II / SECTION II / SUBSECTION II

title: Article 23
text: These Regulations are amended by adding, after section 25, the following subsection and sections: "SECTION VII SUSTAINABLE CONSTRUCTION" 25.1. The roof structure of an uncombustible building of more than 3 floors in building height and more than 250 m2 shall, when the roof slope is less than 2 units vertically in 12 units on the horizontal (2:12) or 16.7%, be designed to receive a type 1 green roof in addition to the loads prescribed by the Code.

title: Article 27.1
text: The roof structure of a building with a height of more than 3 floors and a height of more than 250 m2 shall, when the roof slope is less than 2 units vertically in 12 units horizontally (2:12) or 16.7%, be designed to receive a type 1 green roof in addition to the loads prescribed by the Code.
